per_turn_leaks.student_message: Specifically, any changes in your skin — like sweating or flushing?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I do notice that I sweat a lot during these episodes, actually. It's quite noticeable - I'll be sitting there and suddenly feel like my shirt is soaked through, even if it was just a short walk outside earlier.
